name: Do I need a lawyer for my work dust lung claim in West Valley City?
description: Strongly recommended; contingency basis, boosts payout 2-3x.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work dust lung claim in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Strongly recommended; contingency basis, boosts payout 2-3x.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, especially if denied or complex; they maximize value, handle appeals.** DIY risks low settlements in pneumoconiosis cases[4]. Key factors: Free consults, contingency fees; navigate multi-party liability. Utah bar requires disclosure. Insurers lowball pro se. Get eval from comp specialist.
